title: The Disturbing History of Corn Flakes

chunks.title: Kellogg's Controversy and Protests
chunks.summary: The discussion centers around the differences in ingredients used in Kellogg's Froot Loops in the U.S. versus Canada, highlighting concerns over artificial colors and additives. A protest against Kellogg's is organized, aiming to demand the removal of harmful ingredients from their products, emphasizing the responsibility to protect children's health.

chunks.title: History of Cornflakes
chunks.summary: The transcript explains the origin of cornflakes developed by John Harvey Kellogg in the late 1800s at a sanitarium, intended to reduce libido and masturbation. The segment discusses the nutrient-deprived nature of cornflakes and its implications on health and sexual drive, connecting it to broader dietary beliefs of the time.
chunks.transcript: were developed in 1896 in Battle Creek Michigan at the Battle Creek sanitarium so in the late 1800s psychiatric patients were sent to a sanitarium this was a psychiatric institution and John Harvey Kellogg was involved in this and the reason they were developed was to um decrease the male libido to decrease oh masturbation I do know this the the the cornflake masturbation link yes yes of course yes so this is crazy this is an act this is real American history that cornflakes were developed by John Harvey Kellogg to essentially be so nutrient depleted that you have less carnal desire that you don't have as much of a libido and you don't masturbate so what happens to both men and women when they eat meat we have a libido a healthy sexual drive right because of the unique nutrients and meat but if you give someone cardboard obviously the essential equivalent of cardboard with a cornflake you deplete them of nutrients and it helps quell the libido this is all connected with 7day Adventist sort of religious Dogma but that is the original story of cornflakes and I've told that story on social media and the post got taken down as misinformation yeah actual real history it's they do not want you to know no that the corn flakes are meant to prevent masturvation so say that when you okay I'll say that again oh my gosh I should say that with my little bullhorn at katog did you know they don't want you to to masterate they want you to eat corn flakes and not be have any sex you know like they're anti oh my gosh yeah that's hilarious I forgot that I'm going to have to tell that at a dinner we're doing like a a dinner the night before all of like the health people that are going and I'm going to bring this up it's so crazy so thank you for that work you're doing I'm
